active.text: Photoreal live-action period drama circa 1840s. 35mm film grain, shallow depth of field. Motivated practical light only: candle, oil lamp, moonlight. No cartoon, no soft-3D CG, no modern clothing or anachronisms.
Single chamber primarily; claustrophobic. Close on Narrator eyes and hands; slow push-ins; hold on floorboards and the old man vulture eye. Horror through restraint not gore spectacle.
Narrator is ON CAMERA when speaking (not voice-only). Adult pale nervous man, dark wool coat, 1840s. Old Man elderly with pale blue filmed eye. Officers calm period coats.
